violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the partition pipes and mop sink have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

The walls by the fryer and walls by the mop sink have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
The coving by the backdoor and coving and wall by fryer and door archway were in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a lid. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024
The handwashing sinks in the kitchen and restroom are lacking the proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machines) were observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machines were taken out of service during time of inspection. Ice machines must be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized prior to use. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024
Vacuum packaged salmon was observed thawing with packaging still intact. Salmon was removed from packaging during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024
Boxes of food were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024
Washed wiping clothes observed stored on ladder to dry. PIC informed to remove. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. Knives observed stored in between baseboard of prep sink. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024
Front counter was observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2022

The non-food contact surfaces of the speed racks in the walk-in cooler and partition pipes in lobster tank have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
3 bay sink faucet was observed leaking. Plumbing systems to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024
The walk-in cooler vent and ceiling tiles were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

The walls by the fryer, 3 bay sink and mop sink and the vent above the food prep area have an accumulation of soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
The coving by the backdoor and coving and wall by fryer and door archway were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
